TIAMAT-TIAMAT_FEMME_FATALE_POWER.title: Femme Fatale
TIAMAT-TIAMAT_FEMME_FATALE_POWER.descrip: #Humanoid form, the brood-mother. At the start of your turn: gain 1 Nurture. Build the swarm cheaply here, then cash it in as the Beast.
TIAMAT-TIAMAT_FEMME_FATALE_POWER.smartDe: #Humanoid form, the brood-mother. At the start of your turn: gain 1 Nurture. Build the swarm cheaply here, then cash it in as the Beast.
TIAMAT-TIAMAT_BEAST_POWER.title: Draconic Form
TIAMAT-TIAMAT_BEAST_POWER.description: #Beast II form, the devourer. Your cards apply 1 more Curse, and at the start of your turn you apply 1 Curse to an enemy on your own. The climax form, entered through the Genesis window.
TIAMAT-TIAMAT_BEAST_POWER.smartDescripti: #Beast II form, the devourer. Your cards apply 1 more Curse, and at the start of your turn you apply 1 Curse to an enemy on your own. The climax form, entered through the Genesis window.
TIAMAT-GENESIS_SPENT_POWER.title: Genesis Spent
TIAMAT-GENESIS_SPENT_POWER.description: #Your gauge reached 100 this cycle and Genesis already triggered. Spend NP Charge below 100 to re-arm it.
TIAMAT-GENESIS_SPENT_POWER.smartDescript: #Your gauge reached 100 this cycle and Genesis already triggered. Spend NP Charge below 100 to re-arm it.
TIAMAT-MOTHER_GUTS_POWER.title: Mother's Guts
TIAMAT-MOTHER_GUTS_POWER.description: #The first time you would die this combat, revive at 1 HP and spawn 3 Laḫmu.
TIAMAT-MOTHER_GUTS_POWER.smartDescriptio: #The first time you would die this combat, revive at 1 HP and spawn 3 Laḫmu.
